entries.description: COVID-19 pandemic response failures: Lancet Commission found 40% of US COVID deaths (approx 400,000 as of Feb 2021) attributable to Trump administration actions including elimination of NSC global health security team, vacant CDC/OSHA positions, politicization of masks and vaccines, and lack of national strategy
entries.causation_evidence: Lancet Commission report February 2021; multiple epidemiological studies

entries.description: One Big Beautiful Bill Act (OBBBA): Largest federal healthcare rollback in US history, slashing over $1 trillion from health programs. Approximately 15 million Americans expected to lose Medicaid coverage, leading to increased premature mortality and chronic disease burden
entries.causation_evidence: American Journal of Respiratory and Critical Care Medicine study March 2026; The Guardian reporting

entries.description: Environmental deregulation: Weakened air pollution standards for soot, mercury, and tailpipe emissions. Delayed clean energy projects and forced fossil fuel plant operations. Experts predict new asthma cases, increased hospitalizations for respiratory illness, and premature deaths for hundreds of thousands of Americans
entries.causation_evidence: American Journal of Respiratory and Critical Care Medicine study March 2026; The Guardian; Harvard researchers

entries.description: USAID dismantling and foreign aid freeze: Impact Counter estimates 750,000+ deaths (500,000+ children) from USAID cuts as of January 2026, including HIV, TB, malaria, pneumonia, and malnutrition deaths across low-income countries
entries.causation_evidence: Boston University modeling (Brooke Nichols); Barcelona ISGlobal research (projecting 22M preventable deaths by 2030 from US+European cuts)

entries.description: ACA undermining and Medicaid cuts: First three years of Trump tenure saw 2.3 million Americans lose health coverage, including 760,000 children and teens. Administration proposed $920 billion in Medicaid cuts and burdensome eligibility checks
January 6 Capitol Attack: Violent mob incited by MAGA rhetoric stormed U.S. Capitol to disrupt election certification. Seven deaths (including four officers who died by suicide), 140 officers injured
entries.causation_evidence: Levin Center for Oversight and Democracy (2024); Congressional records; official investigations

entries.description: Muslim Ban (EO 13769): Travel ban affecting refugees from Muslim-majority countries. 133,000 Iraqi and 22,000 Syrian refugees affected. Documented health harms including family separation, worsened mental health, increased hypertension, and structural Islamophobia with effects persisting years after ban
entries.causation_evidence: Frontiers in Psychiatry study (2023); State Department and DHS records

entries.description: Operation Warp Speed: Record development of COVID-19 vaccines (10 months vs typical 5-10 years). NIH estimated 140,000 lives saved in first six months alone. Progressive Policy Institute estimated 2.9 million lives saved total
entries.causation_evidence: NIH report summer 2021; Progressive Policy Institute analysis

entries.description: First Step Act: Bipartisan criminal justice reform reducing recidivism by 37% (12.4% vs pre-FSA 19.8%). 29,946 prisoners released between enactment and January 2023
entries.causation_evidence: Council on Criminal Justice analysis (2023, 2024) — note: causal attribution caution due to overlapping COVID-era tracking

entries.description: Abraham Accords: Normalization agreements between Israel and UAE, Bahrain, Morocco, Sudan. UAE-Israel bilateral investments exceeded $5 billion by 2024. Potential future harm reduction through regional de-escalation (life-year savings not yet quantifiable)
